title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Hyogoro, Shinobu, Orochi as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are they talk- ing about the man Kanjuro mentioned?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're not wrong. If boss Hyogorougoro of the flower was still around, all of the Samural would've joined our cause already.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To be honest... at our current rate, it's going to be impossible for us to gather 5,000 people by the end of next week. We'll probably be able to gather 500, at best...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Is he really that amazing!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 20 years ago, he was the face of Wano Country's underworld.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was in charge of all underworld dealings in the flower capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He even had sway over the five Yakuza bosses of the other regions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was kind to the people, and possessed both power and popularity. He was the epitome of CHIVALRY.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even open admired him in his younger days...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a tale from 20 years ago. According to certain rumours...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He refused to bow to the Kurozumi family, and was executed by Orochi....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fukurokuju, who had also supported the Kozuki family alongside boss Hyogorougoro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Choose to serve under Crochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could not forgive him for his treason... and escaped to a life as a fugitive from Orochi's army...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Shinobu!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So that's why you knew that guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're amazing, Shinobu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, what's with these octo- Puses!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're the MALE BATHHOUSE ATTENDANTS. They are this bathhouse's servants.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I've Oooh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss Hyogorougoro... He's nothing but an old tale nowadays...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like I said before, if you join our crew...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll personally ask Kaido to pardon you for your crimes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shut up!! I don't wanna!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What bad timing....!! Luffy- Dono!! I have the key you need!!

dialogue.speaker: Hyogoro
dialogue.text: This brings back memories, Hyogorougoro!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sure impressed Kaido and Orochi back then.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought the legendary CH/VALROUS MAN would become such a malnourished geezer...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that he would die a pitiful death!! Muhahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not care what becomes of me, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Please spare this young man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I beg you!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
